full_text:
Oracle Linux Bug Fix Advisory ELBA-2025-28042

http://linux.oracle.com/errata/ELBA-2025-28042.html

The following updated rpms for Oracle Linux 9 have been uploaded to the Unbreakable Linux Network:

x86_64:
passt-0^20250512.g8ec1341-2.0.1.el9.x86_64.rpm
passt-selinux-0^20250512.g8ec1341-2.0.1.el9.noarch.rpm

aarch64:
passt-0^20250512.g8ec1341-2.0.1.el9.aarch64.rpm
passt-selinux-0^20250512.g8ec1341-2.0.1.el9.noarch.rpm


SRPMS:
http://oss.oracle.com/ol9/SRPMS-updates/passt-0^20250512.g8ec1341-2.0.1.el9.src.rpm



Description of changes:

[0^20250512.g8ec1341-2.0.1]
- tcp: Cast operands of sequence comparison macros to uint32_t before using them
- tcp: Don't consider FIN flags with mismatching sequence

[0^20250512.g8ec1341-2]
- Resolves: RHEL-106326

[0^20250512.g8ec1341-1]
- Resolves: RHEL-84283

[0^20250320.g32f6212-1]
- Resolves: RHEL-84283

[0^20250217.ga1e48a0-1]
- Resolves: RHEL-79787

[0^20250121.g4f2c8e7-3]
- Resolves: RHEL-75654

[0^20250121.g4f2c8e7-1]
- Resolves: RHEL-75654

[0^20241121.g238c69f-1]
- Resolves: RHEL-65502

[0^20240806-gee36266-2]
- Resolves: RHEL-54268

[0^20240806.gee36266-1]
- Resolves: RHEL-53189
